description.title: Description
description.text: I am a professional with experience in technical support, currently working at TIVIT, focusing on the installation, configuration, and maintenance of systems and equipment. Skilled in user service and agile problem-solving. Knowledgeable in IT, networking, and best practices. Strong teamwork and communication skills. Committed to efficiency and proper system functioning.

tivit.description: Handling corporate tickets and ensuring service SLAs. Responsible for agile resolution of incidents focused on networking and general IT infrastructure, ensuring operational stability.

lamic.description: Assisting users (internal and external customers), solving technical issues, installing and configuring systems.

edn.description: Technical support and customer service. Integral monitoring to ensure the system works properly in the user's environment.

nexti.description: Developer experienced in creating and implementing scalable business systems using Django, along with technical experience in project work using PHP (Laravel) and TS/JS.
